---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition or improvement to OPUS
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear, concise description of the problem this feature would address. Why does the current behaviour fall short?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse.

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits within the scope defined in [docs/whitepaper.md](../../docs/whitepaper.md) §8 ("What we are not building (yet)")
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this hasn't been requested

## Additional context

Mockups, links to prior art, or anything else that would help.
